summary: Completed comprehensive testing of farm management system. Backend APIs working excellently (93.9% success rate), but frontend has critical Select component issues preventing form submissions.

minor_issues.issue: Some cleanup operations fail due to cascading deletes

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem components have empty string values causing runtime errors
ui_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot complete form submissions due to Select component errors

integration_issues.issue: Cannot select animal type due to Select component bug
Cannot select movement type/reason due to Select component bug
Cannot select event type due to Select component bug
Cannot select expense category due to Select component bug

success_percentage.frontend: 60% - Core UI works but forms are broken

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem components - all Select dropdowns have empty string values causing JavaScript errors and preventing form submissions. This blocks all CRUD operations in the application. The error occurs in all form dialogs across Animais, Movimentações, Eventos, and Despesas pages.
